reviewer: direct-review (subagent spawn failed due to bun-eval parsing error)
summary: Hermes adapter is properly registered in the adapter registry, selectable in onboarding harness selector, and produces valid default config with non-empty runtime fields. Tests cover registry resolution, config serialization, and onboarding defaults.

strengths: Clean separation of adapter defaults into reusable buildDefaultConfigValues helper
AgentHarnessSelector uses adapter registry to build valid config at selection time, not after
Tests explicitly verify hermes doesn't fall back to process adapter (VAL-HERMES-004)
Config serialization round-trip test ensures persistence integrity
